mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT pool_id FROM ip_pool_auto_rule WHERE rule_type = 'auto_out' AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT ips.security_code ,ips.security_short_name ,ips.security_type FROM ip_pool_status ips INNER JOIN rrs_securityinfo si ON si.wind_code = ips.security_code WHERE ips.target_pool_id = #{poolId} AND ips.audit_status = '20' AND ips.is_deleted = 0 AND si.maturity_date IS NOT NULL AND si.maturity_date <> '' AND si.maturity_date < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-%d')
